codeReview.summary: Pass. The commit is scoped to `packages/coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md` and adds the required `[Unreleased]` entry mentioning the `todotools` refactor, todo continuation, `todotools.continuation.enabled`, and `--disable-todo-continuation`. The worker transcript and captured `local-ignore/qa-help-output.txt` provide matching evidence that the built CLI and `./pi-test.sh` help surfaces expose the flag and that the wrapper preserves `--disable-todo-continuation`.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, changelog change, validation-contract assertions, and captured help-output evidence. I found no correctness, regression, or scope-compliance issues, so this feature passes scrutiny.
